name: PT Mahaka Radio Integra Tbk
summary: PT Mahaka Radio Integra Tbk engages in the radio broadcasting business in Indonesia. The company owns radio stations for commercial radio broadcasting. It owns and operates 8 radio stations, including JAK 101 fm, GEN 98.7 fm, GEN 103.1 fm, HOT 93.2 fm, KIS 95.1 fm, MUSTANG 88.0 fm, MOST RADIO 105.8 fm, and NOICE. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
